sourceRef: tip:A clean way to answer the tough tuition question

slides.headline: Answer the tough tuition question
slides.body: Understand the key points to ensure compliance and support student veterans effectively.

slides.headline: Identify the Tuition Question
slides.body: Recognize when a student asks about tuition assistance.
bullets: Identify the context of the question

slides.headline: Verify the Eligibility
slides.body: Confirm if the student is eligible for tuition assistance.
bullets: Refer to the Yellow Ribbon Program details

slides.headline: Determine Eligibility for Chapter 33
slides.body: Decide if the student is eligible for Chapter 33 tuition assistance.
bullets: Check if the student meets the 85/15 rule

slides.headline: Address Yellow Ribbon Questions
slides.body: Know how to handle questions related to the Yellow Ribbon Program.
bullets: Refer to your SAA letter for guidance

slides.headline: Provide Clear Answers
slides.body: Communicate the decision and any necessary next steps clearly.
bullets: Refer to the COE (Certificate of Eligibility) for further details

slides.body: Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro at aimilitaryservices.com.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Master the art of answering tough tuition questions for student veterans. Follow these five steps to ensure compliance and support. Learn more at aimilitaryservices.com.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to draw more attention.
